claims.claim: `CONTINUITY_TRAJECTORY_LIMIT=6` can erase Shadow-v3 restless texture and directional gradient between cycles when older trajectory points are simply purged.
claims.rationale: `autonomous.rs` now fetches deeper latent history and renders older high-signal rows as decayed read-only afterimages with bounded weights instead of silently dropping all rows beyond the live six-item trajectory lane.

claims.claim: Hard truncation can clip tail vibrancy, dispersal potential, or `stable_core_semantic_trickle=0.001` anchors in high-entropy cascades.
claims.rationale: `autonomous.rs` now treats Shadow-v3, dispersal, tail/lambda4, and stable-core trickle as continuity/truncation anchors, while `correspondence_v1.rs` uses a named spectral-aware bounded preview policy for shared thread history.

claims.claim: The fix should preserve felt texture without converting overflow or older trajectory afterimages into hidden control force.
claims.rationale: The implemented surfaces are language-only prompt/report context: afterimages are explicitly decayed/read-only, previews remain bounded, and no pressure, fill, PI, sensory cadence, prompt priority, bridge protocol, or live control authority changed.
